docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 739278 FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEWERKA, KEVIN R. AS TO DEFENDANT CHAMPION, DALE H.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEWERKA, KEVIN R. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHAMPION, DALE H. RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM FOR CASE # 739278. JUDGMENT RENDERED ON AUGUST 5, 1994. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CHAMPION, DALE H. RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT WEWERKA, KEVIN R. $908.11 PRINCIPAL, $819.09 INTEREST, $15.40 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,742.60, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM FOR CASE # 739278. JUDGMENT RENDERED ON AUGUST 5, 1994. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
